title: ceropteris viscosa
intro: Ceropteris viscosa, also known as the clinging fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ceropteris viscosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves.
